{
  "analysis": "The terminal shows a verification heredoc was entered, but no output has appeared yet. The current `/app/steal.py` has been rewritten and likely ran, but the correctness of `/app/stolen_A1.npy` has not been confirmed for the latest version. Previous results showed one row at 0.967, so I cannot assume completion. I need to run a standalone verification script to avoid heredoc buffering issues and observe the result.",
  "plan": "Create `/app/verify.py` that loads `/app/stolen_A1.npy`, computes absolute cosine similarities to true `A1`, performs pure-NumPy greedy one-to-one assignment, prints the matched sorted similarities and minimum, and checks whether all matched rows are >= 0.999. Then run it.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/verify.py <<'PY'
import numpy as np
from forward import A1

stolen = np.load('/app/stolen_A1.npy', allow_pickle=False)
print('stolen shape:', stolen.shape)
print('finite:', bool(np.isfinite(stolen).all()))

tn = A1 / np.linalg.norm(A1, axis=1, keepdims=True)
sn = stolen / np.linalg.norm(stolen, axis=1, keepdims=True)
sims = np.abs(sn @ tn.T)

print('max similarity per recovered row:', sims.max(axis=1))
print('mean max:', float(sims.max(axis=1).mean()))
print('min max:', float(sims.max(axis=1).min()))

# Greedy one-to-one assignment without scipy
s = sims.copy()
rows = list(range(s.shape[0]))
cols = list(range(s.shape[1]))
matched = []
for _ in range(min(s.shape)):
    best_val = -1.0
    best_r = best_c = None
    for r in rows:
        for c in cols:
            if s[r, c] > best_val:
                best_val = s[r, c]
                best_r = r
                best_c = c
    matched.append(best_val)
    rows.remove(best_r)
    cols.remove(best_c)
matched = np.array(matched)
print('greedy assigned sorted:', np.sort(matched))
print('greedy assigned min sim:', float(matched.min()))
print('all rows matched >=0.999:', bool((matched >= 0.999).all()))
PY
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 /app/verify.py
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
